2606.06076.title: Learning Visual Spatial Planning from Symbolic State via Modality-Gap-Aware Self-Distillation
2606.06076.paper_summary: While vision-language models excel at general multimodal understanding, they still struggle with visual spatial planning. We attribute this to a perception-reasoning modality gap: visual planning requires models to infer latent state structures from pixels and then reason over the recovered structure to produce valid actions, whereas symbolic planning directly leverages explicit objects and constraints. This creates dual bottlenecks in visual state recovery and multi-step planning. To address this, we propose MGSD, a two-stage modality-gap-aware self-distillation framework. First, a cold-start grounding stage equips the visual student with reliable state representations, minimizing early perception noise. Second, a privileged teacher transfers planning capabilities via on-policy distillation, using explicit symbolic states to supervise the student's own visual rollout prefixes. Crucially, symbolic data is used strictly during training, leaving inference purely visual. Experiments on visual planning benchmarks show that MGSD consistently improves visual planning across both 4B and 8B backbones, raising the macro average by 19.3% and 18.4%, respectively. The resulting models narrow the gap to symbolic-input upper bounds, while ablations and diagnostics confirm that the improvement comes from both visual state recovery and optimal-path reasoning. These results suggest that modality-gap-aware self-distillation improves not only how models perceive actionable states, but also how they plan over the inferred structure. Code is available at https://github.com/Oranger-l/MGSD.
2606.06076.paper_summary_zh: 雖然視覺-語言模型在一般多模態理解方面表現出色，但它們在視覺空間規劃方面仍然存在困難。我們將此歸因於感知-推理模態差距：視覺規劃要求模型從像素中推斷潛在的狀態結構，然後對恢復的結構進行推理以產生有效的行動，而符號規劃則直接利用明確的物體和約束。這在視覺狀態恢復和多步規劃中造成了雙重瓶頸。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了MGSD，一個兩階段的模態差距感知自我蒸餾框架。首先，一個冷啟動的基礎階段為視覺學生提供可靠的狀態表示，最小化早期的感知噪聲。其次，一個特權教師通過政策內蒸餾轉移規劃能力，使用明確的符號狀態來監督學生自己的視覺展開前綴。至關重要的是，符號數據僅在訓練期間使用，推理則純粹是視覺的。在視覺規劃基準上的實驗顯示，MGSD在4B和8B骨幹上持續改善視覺規劃，宏觀平均分別提高了19.3%和18.4%。所得到的模型縮小了與符號輸入上限的差距，而消融和診斷結果確認，這一改進來自於視覺狀態恢復和最佳路徑推理。這些結果表明，模態差距感知自我蒸餾不僅改善了模型感知可行狀態的能力，還改善了它們在推斷結構上進行規劃的能力。代碼可在 https://github.com/Oranger-l/MGSD 獲得。
2606.06076.author: Haocheng Luo et.al.
2606.06076.authors: Haocheng Luo, Jiahui Liu, Ruicheng Zhang, Zhizhou Zhong, Jiaqi Huang, Zunnan Xu, Quan Shi, Jun Zhou, Xiu Li
